text.title: PWA Development Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of PWA Development. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Install prompt never shows on Android; Lighthouse PWA score 30.
antipattern.root-cause: Manifest missing 192/512 icons or maskable variant.
antipattern.fix: Add both sizes + maskable; rerun audit until installable=true.

antipattern.symptom: New deploy ships; users keep seeing 3-week-old build forever.
antipattern.root-cause: SW caches index.html cache-first with no revalidation.
antipattern.fix: Switch shell to network-first with timeout 3s, fall back to cached shell; or stale-while-revalidate with reload prompt.

antipattern.symptom: Engineers see new code in incognito; users on installed PWA see old code for weeks.
antipattern.root-cause: skipWaiting absent; new SW sleeps until tab close.
antipattern.fix: Enable skipWaiting + clients.claim; show user-visible 'New version available - reload' prompt.

antipattern.symptom: Offline navigation shows browser default 'no internet' page.
antipattern.root-cause: No offline.html precached; no NavigationRoute fallback.
antipattern.fix: Precache /offline.html; register NavigationRoute that returns it on fetch failure.
